macro.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P 500 Look for Direction, Oil Slips on Mideast Optimism — Live Updates - WSJ

macro.summary: Major stock indexes were mixed Thursday, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite setting fresh all-time highs but the Dow Jones Industrial Average ticking lower. Meanwhile, oil futures pulled back further after sinking yesterday on hopes a U.S.-Iran peace deal …
